text.title: Auto-Draft Postmortem, No Auto-Publish Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid/invalid examples + forbidden patterns for inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish output.

example.note: `published` must be false; `signoff_by` must be null until human signs; required fields missing.

list.item: wildcard values where enum is required
values outside enum / pattern / numeric bounds
